title: CashflowAnalyzer
intent: Historical cashflow diagnostics, forecasting, and anomaly explanations
requirements: ingestion module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
analysis module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
forecasting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
anomalies module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
insights module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
reporting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
